decisions: Scope included installable skills shown by npx skills add . --list and internal authoring/review skills where they affect catalog quality.
No behavior edits were made in the initial review pass; review tracking artifacts were created.
All current product skills were promoted to published status in skills/<name>/; skills/.experimental remains reserved for future caveat-heavy work.
Added ux-accessibility-heuristics to cover user-facing UX and accessibility prompts that dx-heuristics correctly declines.

last_verification.result: passed with approved network access for npx package resolution; npx skills add . --list found 6 installable skills

next_safe_action: Optional manual review of the new ux-accessibility-heuristics content before release announcement.
